## PublicProfileBaseSchema variable

Base schema for PublicProfile entity. Represents an agent's public-facing profile information.

**Signature:**

```typescript
PublicProfileBaseSchema: z.ZodObject<
	{
		id: z.ZodString
		agentId: z.ZodString
		createdAt: z.ZodBranded<z.ZodDate, 'InstantUTC'>
		updatedAt: z.ZodBranded<z.ZodDate, 'InstantUTC'>
	},
	'strip',
	z.ZodTypeAny,
	{
		id: string
		createdAt: Date & z.BRAND<'InstantUTC'>
		updatedAt: Date & z.BRAND<'InstantUTC'>
		agentId: string
	},
	{
		id: string
		createdAt: Date
		updatedAt: Date
		agentId: string
	}
>
```
